recentTweets.text: American leadership in biomedical innovation supports domestic drug development. We need to deliver a clinical trial environment friendly to rural communities, innovative brilliance and accelerated research. https://t.co/mLwOYGeGao
RT @NACHC: Where you live shouldn't determine whether you have access to cutting-edge treatments. Thank you, @HouseCommerce Chairman @RepMG…

Last week, I presented new and replacement medals to a veteran who served during the Korean DMZ conflict.

The ceremony at the Bassett Historical Center received local and media attention for this much deserved recognition. https://t.co/FMPuJALiV2

Maintain American leadership in biomedical innovation!

The competitive edge we exercise expands opportunities for investments, improvements in drug development and better care to patients.
Proud to be a leader on a series of bills today that target pill presses, help law enforcement and make American communities safer.

Invasion of firearm transaction history?

Not on Republicans’ watch!

Today, I voted to protect the privacy of gun owners and their firearm purchases. https://t.co/fOccf8IX0M

A veterinary clinic in Wise was part of a weekend-long health care Expo supported by the Health Wagon.

I spoke with clinic volunteers and residents as they welcomed the event. https://t.co/VPZCuhsgx7

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 7.10.26

TOPIC: Actions on Agriculture

https://t.co/TVY9KTyfgu

Today’s report confirms the presence of fraud in the ACA marketplace. 

Fake identity enrollment in Obamacare needs to be addressed.

This weekend, I visited the Move Mountains Medical Mission to see volunteer actions help locals in Wise County. Health Wagon, Radford University, Howard University, Saginaw Valley State University and UVA-Wise all contributed personnel to provide health care services. https://t.co/2jZ3gcwN4R

I appreciated a Thursday tour of the West Piedmont Higher Education Center in Martinsville.

Local education opportunities support regional workforce development and economic growth. https://t.co/LrG4uNEIcE

Hard hit rural regions like Southside Virginia benefit from tax relief policies. @HouseGOP passed no tax on hourly overtime, making a greater impact on working families.

Good to discuss numerous federal policies with the Martinsville-Henry County Chamber of Commerce this week. https://t.co/AsO1ZbFB7q

Liberty University is an academic institution with a culture rooted in the Christian faith.

I enjoyed talking with LU leader Jonathan Falwell during a spring DC reception. https://t.co/Jd8h74P1as

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 7.3.26

TOPIC: WFTC

https://t.co/8OyqOaZwZ5

Chester McGlothlin served American forces with class and honor.

Through missions in the European, American and Pacific Theaters, he showed great resolve.

Yesterday, I visited Buchanan County to deliver his WW2 medals to his daughter. https://t.co/WuB1hZsVWI

Today, my tour of the Clinch Valley Medical Center helped me gather input from dedicated rural health care providers that serve our region. I remain committed in Congress to strengthen rural health care relationships for the benefit of patients in Virginia’s Ninth District. https://t.co/0sVpEueoCa
RT @decidersshow: @RepMGriffith @BrodyMullinsDC @camoosomiller Watch the full conversation on YouTube. https://t.co/3RMlElcjq1
https://t.co/RTu4WcRSXt

I am a proud leader in Congress of actions that protect American lives from the synthetic opioid crisis.

I sat down with @BrodyMullinsDC and @camoosomiller on the @decidersshow to discuss my HALT Fentanyl bill, support for rural communities and delivering American energy wins. https://t.co/KDgwmseZwN

Today, I met with local Floyd County officials to explore potential economic development projects that benefit our region.

Such project ideas hopefully will boost economic activity, attract businesses and provide additional opportunities. https://t.co/RpIKhgHvS7
RT @decidersshow: He carried the bill for a Medal of Honor fifty years overdue. @RepMGriffith on Colonel John Ripley, a fellow Virginian —…

The EPA Brownfields Program can help redevelop abandoned properties and revitalize the economies of rural America.

As a senior member of the Committee that oversees the EPA, I will continue to work to ensure the program adequately serves our rural communities. https://t.co/jfBhwpmVdX

A Fourth of July like no other.

Happy 250th birthday America!

May we continue to honor our past, work in the present and aspire in the future for continued American greatness. https://t.co/2E1LKMmi71

More USDA disaster assistance is coming to parts of Virginia.

My office is ready to help facilitate access to federal assistance. Additionally, I will continue to advocate for our farming communities as they navigate through growing season challenges and record temperatures.
https://t.co/3aPb2YcQNI

I am committed to reviewing the SCOTUS ruling on birthright citizenship and assessing what Congress can do to fix this issue.

Our country loses when appropriate guardrails for American citizenship are not in place. https://t.co/ndQHkJZdWr

I helped lead federal engagement to secure a USDA Secretarial natural disaster declaration.

Because of spring frost and freeze events, Virginia farmers need immediate relief. 

Secretary Rollins approved Virginia’s request! https://t.co/T1Fg9XB5k5

I am fighting in DC against radical anti-gun actions. SCOTUS helped deliver a pro-2nd Amendment ruling last week, and they may be called again later to review Virginia’s unconstitutional gun grab.

I did buy my AR before the July 1 ban in Christiansburg. https://t.co/X6Ty41YdIG

Federal programs to expand broadband connections for rural communities must look at all options, including lower earth orbit satellites.

While large customers like hospitals and schools may need fiber, our goal is to connect everyone as efficiently as possible. https://t.co/3Fil6uKqTx

As someone who supported the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act, this SCOTUS ruling lets states protect female athletics!

States including Virginia should adopt policies that keep biological men out of women’s sports.

The Working Families Tax Cuts:

Stopped 22% tax hike on average taxpayers ❌
No tax on tips, no tax on hourly overtime ✅
Tax relief for Main Street businesses ✅

@HouseGOP looking out for American families! https://t.co/2WgztvKB3X

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 6.26.26

TOPIC: Celebrating the Nation’s 250th Birthday: Part 2

https://t.co/EmQ3JR0iDb

Transparency for patients ✅
Tackling illicit drug threats ✅
Expand reach of community health center funding ✅

My Health Subcommittee is focused on accomplishing these goals through various bills before the Health Subcommittee.

Governor Spanberger is on notice. Her illegal gun grab faces legitimate challenges in the courts.

While I bought my AR before the July 1 ban goes into effect, I believe Spanberger’s unconstitutional action will be overturned.

Data shows that AI chatbots overwhelmingly tend to echo leftwing viewpoints.

While AI is a tool that can in some ways support Congress, overreliance on the technology poses issues.

Today is the opening day of the Great American State Fair in DC. The fair celebrates our beautiful country’s 250th anniversary.

Look closely in the photo to see the Ferris wheel from the Fair! https://t.co/YZjCe4GXuq
President Trump came to Capitol Hill to push for the Senate to act on the SAVE America Act. I support filibuster and parliamentarian reform to get commonsense voting ID policies into law!

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 6.19.26

Celebrating the Nation’s 250th Birthday: Part 1

https://t.co/1GuxdD5Kyz
On Juneteenth, I toured the Booker T. Washington Memorial in Franklin County. At one point in the tour, we stood at the exact spot where Washington learned he was freed. https://t.co/S21wAOiXSM
Happy Father’s Day! https://t.co/nV7fQZweM1

I am looking forward to reviewing the newly released information from Director Gabbard since I was part of the Congressional investigation.

A lieutenant of Fauci, Dr. David Morens, is already under DOJ indictment.

Freedoms granted to slaves in the U.S inspired many civic leaders, such as Booker T. Washington, to help advocate for progress.

We celebrate these figures and more on Juneteenth. Happy Juneteenth! https://t.co/GWsqEErEJ2

I am at the White House today to celebrate President Trump award the Medal of Honor posthumously to Colonel John Walter Ripley of Radford, Virginia.

Colonel Ripley’s acts of valor during the Vietnam War deserve heavy commendation and praise. https://t.co/AghID3RuK0

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 6.12.26

Topic: Librarian of Congress

https://t.co/eilYLb3QYd

Bedford County is a WWII Heritage City, the only such designation in Virginia.

The National D-Day Memorial is the primary body that commemorates our D-Day heroes.

I visited the Memorial on the 82nd anniversary of D-Day and spoke with its President/CEO April Cheek-Messier. https://t.co/cIPAuSXmKn
I appreciated an invitation to the Craig County High School’s football team banquet to speak with team members and their families in May. https://t.co/YIgAjF49D4

For this year’s National Day of Prayer, I addressed a group in Lebanon. 

We are thankful for the gifts and blessings to our country, communities and culture over 250 years. We will continue to observe, honor and pray as we approach our 250th anniversary. https://t.co/okz0Vzskhc
Glenvar’s victory this weekend means they are Virginia Class 2 Boys Soccer champions. What a great season ending!
Cave Spring High School takes home the Virginia Class 3 Girls Soccer Championship. This is the program’s first title in school history! Congratulations!
RT @WhiteHouse: “The Deal with Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete. Congratulations to all!” President Donald J. Trump 🇺🇸 https://t.co…

The Virginia Class 3 title for boys soccer is in the hands of Christiansburg High School after a hard earned victory!!

Congratulations on this accomplishment!

A symbol of strength, liberty, unity and so much more.

Today we celebrate our beautiful flag and the values that make America great. https://t.co/XAYEgVfvSI
Congratulations to Abingdon High School on its Virginia Class 3 title in softball! The girls should be proud of their hard work.

Lebanon High School baseball is crowned Virginia Class 2 champions!

This title is great news for Russell County!
Blacksburg High School claims the Class 4 Boys Soccer Title. Congratulations on a strong finish to the season!
Time to celebrate for Patrick Henry High School in Glade Spring after its victory in the Virginia Class 1 Baseball championship! Great work to the players, coaches and staff!

The entire Ninth District is praying for Bedford County after a tent collapse during an outdoor service at EastLake Community Church. 
I will continue monitoring this situation as details are made public.

Bland County High School as Virginia Class 1 Girls team tennis champions! This is their first such title in program history.

Way to go!

Agriculture is a focal point of the economy for Ninth District communities.

In wake of VA Governor Spanberger’s request for federal expedited disaster assistance, I am helping lead federal engagement that urges the USDA to provide disaster relief for Virginia farmers. https://t.co/mWfkLRKKqo

Work on health proposals to ensure that Americans access better information and transparency data while developing a more efficient, accountable and affordable health care landscape.

Greater transparency is better for American patients.

https://t.co/toD7qs3cPN

Local Republican Commonwealth Attorneys work to pursue justice for victims.

Sanctuary politicians need to follow suit and protect Virginians from criminal illegal aliens.

New nuclear power reactor designs could help increase power production and lower electric bills. My legislation, H.R. 6464, with Reps. Schrier and Veasey will streamline reactor licensing and eliminate an unnecessary 1950s requirement. https://t.co/LjbAGogU3A

RT @HouseAdmin: 🚨 The House just passed @RepMGriffith's Legislative Branch Agencies Clarification Act!

Get caught up to speed on this impo…

Accountability, clarity and good governance.

That is what my pro-Article I bill delivers to help institutions serve Congress and the American people. https://t.co/pr14QsygVb

Auburn High School delivered a Class 1 boys title in track and field. 

Your community is proud of you!

Floyd County High School repeats as Class 2 champions for boys track and field. 

Congratulations on this accomplishment!

Floyd County High School claims their first ever Class 2 title in girls' outdoor track and field.

Great work on the season!

Congratulations to the Blacksburg High School girls track team on their Class 4 Virginia championship. 

Three straight championships for their program!

On June 6, 1944, American soldiers reached the beaches of Normandy to liberate the world from Nazi tyranny.

Our brave D-Day heroes, including those from Virginia’s Ninth District and Bedford, fought and died for our freedom.

Their sacrifices won’t be forgotten.
Foreign adversaries have the capability to jam the GPS signals we all rely on everyday. I am glad @HouseCommerce is working in a bipartisan way to examine backup alternatives. https://t.co/0bUNn6bsb9

NIH scientists caught smuggling monkeypox into the U.S.?

What research interests does this action support?

This national security and public health threat warrants scrutiny. https://t.co/0GDBLipl2p

The Architect of the Capitol is responsible for making visitor experiences at the Capitol buildings accessible and convenient.

I urge the AOC to create adult changing stations for disabled visitors and highlight businesses from our area. https://t.co/yDHnyzXQ3n

This Saturday, America will observe the 82nd anniversary of D-Day.

I spoke on the House floor to honor our D-Day heroes, the National D-Day Memorial and Lucille Hoback Boggess. https://t.co/tCPtl7cp0c

On Lou Gehrig Day, we are reminded of the challenges facing patients and families impacted by ALS.

Congress will use the example of Gehrig and the stories of countless others to advocate for the ALS community. ACT for ALS is one critical policy that I am pushing for. https://t.co/vRpvsP6jmM

A ceremonial escort for fallen Carroll County Deputy Logan Utt started in Roanoke before heading towards Mount Airy, NC. Today in Roanoke, I gathered with local communities and law enforcement officials to see the escort, remember Deputy Utt’s life and honor his service. https://t.co/D0z5P1wQ57

CONGRESSMAN GRIFFITH’S WEEKLY E-NEWSLETTER 5.29.26

Topic: Housing

https://t.co/GWUZq0yala

The Maryland mail-in mess sows doubts in voters’ minds and compromises the security of elections.

Our committee will exercise appropriate scrutiny and oversight.

Congratulations to Virginia High’s Moira McKenzie, who won this year’s Congressional Art Competition in the Ninth District!

And great work to Patrick County’s Kamiya Reynolds and Alexis Cox on securing placed finishes! The Ninth District has incredible artistic talents. https://t.co/GY2x6rmJw3

Undetermined number of mail-in ballots with inaccurate info sent to voters.

Maryland’s response?

Send everybody who requested a mail-in ballot a replacement ballot!

Republicans working to investigate this troubling mail-in voting issue. Protect U.S elections!

Colonel John Walter Ripley is an American patriot with a remarkable life of service to our country. For his service, and thanks to the incredible work of his family, he will soon receive the ultimate honor, the Congressional Medal of Honor. More on this story here: https://t.co/rMXI1OK0ym

Driving out independently owned physician practices leads to health care provider consolidation and levies higher prices on patients.

Reforms to the physician fee schedule can help alleviate these issues and lower costs for Americans. https://t.co/mczQM5DMck

The Memorial Day parade in Marion annually honors Southwest Virginia’s fallen heroes.

Today, I walked in Marion’s parade and gave thanks to our region’s incredible fallen heroes. https://t.co/oBRw75CjMg

Virginia’s Ninth District observes Memorial Day to pay tribute to the ultimate sacrifices made by American servicemembers.

We continue to honor the legacy of their dedication, resilience and service. https://t.co/DPpcSnwhFP
Thank you @POTUS for pursuing peace and working to open the Strait of Hormuz!

Prayers for the secret service agents who responded to shots fired at the White House.

They continue to work night and day to keep President Trump safe.

Political violence is never acceptable.

Last weekend, I addressed the graduating class at Thomas Walker High School in Lee County. We wish these students the best of luck as they begin their next chapter.

Congratulations to all our Ninth District graduates and students on completing the 2025-2026 school year! https://t.co/8kK0VXVbxv

Topic: Finding a Cure for ALS aka Lou Gehrig’s Disease

https://t.co/6BY44QmnKy

I join NASCAR fans as we mourn the tragic loss of Kyle Busch.

Busch won countless races, which included two cup victories at Martinsville Speedway and nine just outside the Ninth District at the Bristol Motor Speedway.

Racing will continue to be a beloved sport in our region. https://t.co/WJSemKfHbr

Accountable Care Organizations (ACOs) support American providers and patients.

H.R. 5347 from Reps. @VernBuchanan and @RepDanCrenshaw will reduce burdens on ACOs and make it more efficient for them to deliver care. https://t.co/XmKBNtIgGk

Virginia is one of the most affected states by Lyme disease.

I continue to support the Kay Hagan Tick Act that will help our public health battle against tick-borne illnesses. https://t.co/47bG7GEcES

President Trump’s summit in China protected U.S. interests.

These negotiations are part of a larger strategy to keep Americans safe, free and prosperous. https://t.co/fpZDFFxS5Q

Virginia Ninth District law enforcement will continue to protect our communities from criminal illegal aliens.

Executive actions need to respect and encourage this reality. Sanctuary policies do not serve the public good.

https://t.co/3iRmKJ4CEL

The Health Subcommittee continues to look for solutions on health care affordability.

Competition is one key to maintain a stable and sustainable physician payment system.

A talking filibuster puts Democrats on the record, not allowing them to place anonymous holds behind closed doors.

Talking filibuster to move SAVE America forward!
